Moin moin


desktop@ would like to ask for an exp-run to update expat to 2.4.9.

The patch is attached, and can also be found here:

https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/0001-textproc-expat2-update-to-2.4.9.patch


mfg Tobias
